feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Looking for app developers who monitor apps they deployed
entry.content:
Hi,

We're working on a new dashboard for application monitoring for frontend, backend, and fullstack developers. 

I'm looking for developers who monitor the application they deployed for short interview to better understand what info you would expect to see and what actions you would expect to be available for you.

No need to prepare anything. Only meet for 30 min interview and impact on dashboard design.

Your feedback is highly appreciated.

Ravid (ravid.ellenbogen@sap.com)

entry.title: Looking for app developers who monitor apps they deployed
entry.content:
Hi,

We're working on a new dashboard for application monitoring for frontend, backend, and fullstack developers. 

I'm looking for developers who monitor the application they deployed for short interview to better understand what info you would expect to see and what actions you would expect to be available for you.

No need to prepare anything. Only meet for 30 min interview and impact on dashboard design.

Your feedback is highly appreciated.

Ravid (ravid.ellenbogen@sap.com)

entry.title: CORS (Cross-Origin Resource Sharing) Error in SAP Build Apps - OData API Call
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I'm experiencing a CORS (Cross-Origin Resource Sharing) error while calling an OData API from SAP Build Apps. Despite configuring the API and app settings, I continue to encounter this issue on Web-browser.
 
Error Details:
  • Error Message: 
  • Product: SAP Build Apps 
  • OData API Version: V2.0
  • Browser/Platform: Mozilla/5.0
Steps Taken:
  • Verified API and app credentials
  • Tested API calls using tools like Postman (successful)
  • Configuring proxy settings in SAP Build
  • Adding CORS headers manually in the API requests
  • Using CORS-enabled libraries
Question:
Can anyone provide guidance on resolving this CORS error in SAP Build Apps? Are there specific settings or configurations I'm missing? Specifically:
  • How to configure SAP Build to handle CORS requests?
  • Best practices for handling CORS in SAP Build apps?
  • Any known workarounds or third-party libraries that can help resolve this issue?
Thank you for your assistance.
 
Best regards,
Aman K.

entry.title: How we connect SAP Build Apps with PostgreSQL.
entry.content: I am created an application with SAP Build App. But, I don't know how to connect SAP Build App with PostgreSQL.

entry.title: Error in SAP Build apps Build service 4.11.167
entry.content:
I suddenly get an error when trying to make a web build in SAP Build apps. I then tried to Build an older app that I havent touched since I created it and it gives the same error message. I cant make any Build at the moment. I am using the Community edition. I have searched the forum and found others getting the same error message but not any solutions except not making copies of an app but instead saving them as new projects. I cant see that I have that option in the Community edition.Tried to make a build with an app that I know is not copied but it does not work either. Please help! Thanks!

 

AB version: 2.13.4
COMMAND: 

NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=12240 NEXT_SUPPORT_RELATIVE_PATHS=true USER_METERING_ENABLED=true SHOW_SUBSCRIPTION_VERIFICATION_NOTIFICATION=false SUBSCRIPTION_VERIFICATION_NOTIFICATION_DISMISSIBLE=true  npxrnv export -p web -s standalone -c standalone --ci --yes --skipRnvCheck --packageManager yarn --template @sapappgyver/orchestra-template-standalone@4.11.167 -r 

FAILED with ERROR: 

Command failed with exit code 1: npx rnv export -p web -s standalone -c standalone --ci --yes --skipRnvCheck --packageManager yarn --template @sapappgyver/orchestra-template-standalone@4.11.167 -r

entry.title: Why is a SAP Build APPS app 10 times faster on an Android device then on a web server?
entry.content: I have built and app and tested it both on a webbserver and as an app on an Android device. When I run it on the tablet it is approx 10 times faster then when I run the app on the webbserver. I tested it on the local webbserver. It is also slow when I launch the app in the preview mode in SAP Build apps. Does anyone know if I can do something to fix this? Thanks?

entry.title: Problem with request body mapper and how to write the code
entry.content:
Hi,

I built and app and it works perfect on webb and in the beginning also on an Android tablet. Suddenly the functions that made calls to oData API stopped working on all tablets at the same time. I have not been able to solve this so now I decided to change the data sources to REST api instead since they have worked perfect. Problem is that when I for example wants to make a call and GET records sending conditions I cant seem to write the correct code in the request body mapper. I get all records evry time when i test. For example a simple call with just one filter condition like this:

ENCODE_JSON({ "conditions": [ { "field": "U_DocEntry", "operator": "=", "value": 478 } ]}) OR

ENCODE_JSON({"U_DocEntry":478})

I make calls to SAP Business one service layer and in this case it is a UDT(own table). Can someone please tell me what I am doing wrong? Thanks!

entry.title: BAPI exception : Prerequisites are missing
entry.content:
Hi,

When using Set SAP Connection (Basic) BAPI activity in sap build process automation i am getting this error "BAPI exception: Prerequisites are missing". Can you please let me know what exactly i need to do now to overcome this error and make a successful connection with SAP through BAPI.....

entry.title: SAP Build Apps - Visual Cloud Functions - "RBAC: access denied" on retrive, create
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have created a Visual cloud function project in SAP Build Apps and created an entity. When I tried to retrieve the entity via Browse Data  or add a row manually via Browse Data I get the below error.

 

 

The role and user configuration looks ok to me. Tried deleting and reconfiguring the roles but did not help.

I made sure the App is deployed after changing the roles.

I am using the same email id to login. 

 

 

Any pointers on this is highly appreciated.
@Dan_Wroblewski @JoeBinkley @beapasch

entry.title: Combining Data from Multiple APIs in SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
Hi amazing SAP enthusiasts!

I hope you’re all having a great day! I’m diving into a project using SAP Build Apps and could really use your expertise on a particular challenge I’m facing.

I’m trying to display data in a single table that pulls from two different APIs. API1 gives me two of the fields I need, while API2 provides the other two. My goal is to combine these fields into one cohesive table.

If anyone has experience with this, I’d love to hear your tips or best practices! Are there specific functions or approaches within SAP Build Apps that can help me achieve this integration smoothly

Looking forward to your insights!

entry.title: How we can filter Odata data in SAP BUILD APP.
entry.content:
I got data in SAP BUILD APP with Odata URL. But now I want to know how we can filter only selected
data (UserID, Employee Name) in SAP BUILD APP.

entry.title: Re: CORS (Cross-Origin Resource Sharing) Error in SAP Bui...
entry.content:
Hi @_Aman_ 

It looks like the CORS error might be due to an issue with the link you’re using, as it points to a cloud-hosted application. I recommend setting up SAP BTP (Business Technology Platform) destinations to manage connections more securely and avoid CORS issues.

  1. Make sure your destination is correctly set with the proper URL and authentication.
  2. Use transaction code RZ10 to configure CORS settings in your S/4HANA system, allowing your OData API to accept requests from your application.
  3. If you manage the OData service, make sure the necessary CORS headers are included.

Testing through SAP Build Apps after these changes should help. Let me know if you need further assistance!

entry.title: Trigger a Process Automation when a new Email arrives or File comes to a folder
entry.content:
Hi

Is there a way to trigger an Automation when ever a new email comes or a file comes in a folder? I did not find any standard feature yet. I can schedule the Automation to run every few minutes, but again it will not be the best approach. 

Any inputs on this would be helpful. 

Regards

Sandip

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation Error: The Timeline is empty
entry.content:
Hi,

When I'm running an automation, the Desktop Agent status shows 'An automation is running', but the logs indicate that the timeline is empty. This issue occurs inconsistently.

entry.title: Remove the open page animation
entry.content: I implemented a custom tab bar, and I want to move between the tabs without open page animation. How can I use the 'Open page' or 'Replace page' without the slide transition effect?

entry.title: Getting issue in running automation
entry.content:
i have already updated the agent's sdk version. I even tried with the same version given still every time getting same issue

 

SAP Build SAP Build Process Automation SAP Workforce Performance Builder, desktop edition# SAP Process Integration

entry.title: Need advice to make a GET authentication API work in iRPA
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to know if you could give me a quick hand regarding a pretty straight-forward API call that I have been trying to make in an automation in iRPA for a couple of days now. The problematic API is API 1 (API 2 is working like a charm in iRPA), see details as below.

The authentication process consists in calling two APIs consecutively:

  1. API 1: method GET, no parameter, returns a token named XSRF-TOKEN within the response cookie that I need to retrieve in order to use it in:

  2. API 2: method POST, header authorization encoded in base 64 with username and password, X-Xsrf-Token retrieved in API 1. Returns a bearer in response header.

API 1 is working in Postman but somehow I can't make it function in iRPA.

These are some of my attempts (code as part of a custom script), some of them might be awkward (sorry):

a.

 

return {
method: 'GET',
url:'https://sandbox.entreprises.xxxx.gouv.fr/api/init',
responseType: 'json',
resolveBodyOnly: false
headers:{
}
};

 

=> Response code 500 (Internal Servor Error)

b. (N.B.: that one was recommended by SAP Web services Best Practices, see screenshot below)

 

return {
method: 'GET',
url: 'https://sandbox.entreprises.xxxx.gouv.fr/api/init' ,
responseType:'json',
resolveBodyOnly: false
};

 

=> Response code 500 (Internal Servor Error)

c. (this is the one I use for API 2, which is working, thought I would try the same for API 1)

 

const options = {
resolveBodyOnly : false,
responseType: 'json',
url: 'https://sandbox.entreprises.xxxx.gouv.fr/api/init',
method: 'GET',
headers: {
'Accept' : 'application/json',
'Content-Type': 'application/json',
}
};

const response = await irpa_core.request.call(options);
return response.headers;

 

=> Response code 500 (Internal Servor Error)

d.

 

async function fetchToken () {
const options = {
resolveBodyOnly : true,
responseType: 'json',
url: 'https://sandbox.entreprises.xxxx.gouv.fr/api/init',
method: 'GET',
headers: {
'Accept' : 'application/json',
'Content-Type': 'application/json',
'XSRF-TOKEN': 'fetch'
}
};
const response = await irpa_core.request.call(options);
return response;

 

=> Response code 500 (Internal Servor Error)

It is not the first time I handle API calls in SAP iRPA, and it always succeeded even with more complex ones. The irony of this being that I managed to make the API 2 work in iRPA.

Automation in itself is also quite simple: custom script (with no input) => call web service => create variable. See here:

Note that I already read detailed blogs, tutorials and videos (for which I am very grateful) before contacting you. I’m kind of disarmed in front of something that should supposedly be simple to run…

Would you have any clue how to make this work please?

Thanks beforehand for your time and I’m looking forward to reading you.

Kind regards,

LM.

entry.title: CAP Application for Business Process Automation approval form?
entry.content:
I saw the following blog to 'Create an SAP UI5 Task for a Business Process'

Create an SAP UI5 Task for a Business Process | SAP Tutorials

My question is, is this only option for replacing the standatd BPA Approval form with a UI5 app, or is this also possible with CAP/Fiori elements?

If so, how?

entry.title: Conversion of Json data to xml in build process automation
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am new to SAP Build Process Automation. I have a requirement where i need to consume the data using odata service and convert it to the xml format. I am able to get the data using the process and action. Now i need to convert this data fetched from the action and convert to xml. I know we are having the JSON to XML template in the build process automation. But i was strucked on how to pass the data from the action step to convert.Please find the sequence of steps.

Can you please suggest about how to convert the data to xml.
Here I am not able to add the conversion step as it is accessible in automation step only.

Regards
Santosh Vegi.

entry.title: SAP Build process automation - Document Template - Error
entry.content:
Hi,

We built a process using SAP Document Information Extraction Using Templates, and it worked fine.

Now we created new subaccount and we move our project there, but we are getting an error when we try to create/change/use a template.

The message is "SAP_IPA_28014: The requested Document Information Extraction service operation could not be completed. Call to Document Information Extraction failed with status 400 BAD_REQUEST.

I checked and I have the role collection ProcessAutomationDeveloper that contains the role Document_Information_Extraction_UI_Templates_Admin.

What else can be missing?

Thanks

SAP Build Process Automation , Document Information Extraction
